sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Progyny (PGNY) director Kevin Gordon sells 5,500 shares and shifts holdings to trust
feed.summary: Progyny director Kevin K. Gordon sold 5,500 shares of common stock at $24.99 per share, reducing his direct holdings to 9,318 shares. Concurrently, 2,526 shares were transferred from his direct ownership into the Kevin Gordon Revocable Declaration of Trust, which now holds 15,027 shares with Gordon as trustee. This activity, reported in a Form 4 SEC filing, represents a net-sell position of 5,500 shares and a restructuring of his personal and trust assets.

feed.title: Director at OP Bancorp (NASDAQ: OPBK) exercises 3,371 RSUs, gets 2,987 award
feed.summary: OP Bancorp director Min Kim engaged in equity compensation activities on May 28, 2026. Kim exercised 3,371 previously granted restricted stock units (RSUs) into common stock and received a new grant of 2,987 RSUs. Following these transactions, Kim directly holds 614,796 shares of OP Bancorp common stock, with no open-market purchases or sales reported.

feed.title: Oil-Dri Corp of America stock (US6779001037): No verified same-day catalyst on Friday
feed.summary: On Friday, May 29, 2026, Oil-Dri Corp of America (ODC) traded in the U.S. market without any identified same-day company news or analyst updates that would act as a market catalyst. The stock's valuation and sentiment remain anchored to its U.S. listing context, with the most recent dated price point of $59.22 from July 2025 being too old for current valuation signals. Investors are awaiting future company updates or earnings-related filings for new market insights.

feed.title: Outset Medical's Marc Nash to Depart as Executive Vice President, R&D, Operations and Service
feed.summary: Outset Medical announced that Marc Nash will depart from his role as Executive Vice President, R&D, Operations and Service, effective June 5, 2026. Nash is leaving to pursue other professional opportunities, and his departure is not due to any dispute with the company. The company has not yet disclosed information about his replacement.

feed.title: Navitas (NVTS) director-affiliated entities sell shares, receive 1.15M earnout stock
feed.summary: Entities linked to Navitas Semiconductor director Richard J. Hendrix sold 143,814 shares of Class A Common Stock in late May 2026 at weighted average prices between $28-$30 per share. Separately, the company transferred 1,147,225 shares to Live Oak Sponsor Partners II, LLC (an entity Hendrix is a managing member of) on May 18, 2026, as part of a settlement agreement for prior earnout share obligations. Despite the sales, Hendrix retains substantial indirect holdings in Navitas Semiconductor.

feed.title: Nutrien (NTR) sets terms for US$1B 2031 and 2036 senior notes under updated indenture
feed.summary: Nutrien Ltd. (NTR) has formalized the terms for US$1 billion in new senior notes, comprising US$500 million due in 2031 with a 4.850% interest rate and US$500 million due in 2036 with a 5.350% interest rate, under an updated indenture. This Second Supplemental Indenture establishes the roles of The Bank of New York Mellon as U.S. Trustee and Computershare Advantage Trust of Canada as Canadian Trustee, defining their respective responsibilities, particularly regarding compliance with Canadian trust indenture legislation for Canadian noteholders. The agreement integrates these new notes into Nutrien's existing debt framework from 2018, as amended in 2024.

feed.title: Navitas (NVTS) director Ranbir Singh sells 3.7M shares but keeps large stake
feed.summary: Navitas Semiconductor Corp director Ranbir Singh sold a total of 3.72 million Class A Common Stock shares across May 27-28, 2026, for approximately $108.70 million. Despite the significant sales, Singh retains a substantial stake of nearly 15 million shares in the company, signaling continued investment. The transactions were open-market sales at weighted average prices of $29.29 and $28.72 per share, and the details were disclosed in a Form 4 SEC filing.

feed.title: Olaplex (NASDAQ: OLPX) sets July 27 hearing on derivative settlement
feed.summary: Olaplex Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: OLPX) is nearing final approval for a settlement in stockholder derivative litigation. The proposed settlement includes corporate governance reforms and allocates $700,000 for attorneys' fees and expenses, to be paid by the defendants' insurers. A final settlement hearing is scheduled for July 27, 2026, where shareholders can object to the terms if desired.

feed.title: Texas Instruments director Martin S. Craighead sells $3.2 million in stock
feed.summary: Martin S. Craighead, a director at Texas Instruments Inc. (NASDAQ:TXN), sold 10,000 shares of common stock worth approximately $3.2 million on May 28, 2026. This sale follows a 72% surge in TXN shares over the past year, with the stock currently trading above its InvestingPro Fair Value, indicating potential overvaluation. Despite the sale, Craighead still directly holds 14,359 shares, while the company has been the subject of several analyst upgrades and strategic discussions highlighting its role in the AI data center market.

feed.title: Equinix Geo Zones Targets Data Sovereignty As Stock Trades Below Targets
feed.summary: Equinix has launched Equinix Fabric Geo Zones, a new solution designed to help customers comply with data sovereignty regulations like GDPR and LGPD by enforcing geographic boundaries at the network level. This product introduction comes as Equinix's stock (NasdaqGS:EQIX) is trading around $1,068.04, below analyst targets, despite strong long-term returns. Investors are advised to monitor the adoption rate of Geo Zones by enterprises and cloud providers, as this will be a key factor in how this development impacts Equinix's future performance.

feed.title: Is Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Now Attractive After A 41% One Year Share Price Fall?
feed.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) has seen a 41.5% decline in its share price over the past year, sparking investor interest in its current valuation. An Excess Returns model suggests the stock is undervalued by 37.6% based on an intrinsic value of $322.15 per share. However, its current P/E ratio of 32.06x is significantly higher than the industry and peer averages, indicating it might be overvalued by a different metric.

feed.title: National Health Investors (NHI) stockholders elect full board and ratify BDO
feed.summary: National Health Investors (NHI) held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 27, 2026, where shareholders elected all seven director nominees, approved executive compensation on an advisory basis, and ratified BDO USA, P.C. as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026. A quorum of 87.46% of eligible shares was present, and all proposals passed with significant majorities.

feed.title: [Form 4] NEUROCRINE BIOSCIENCES INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Neurocrine Biosciences director Johanna Mercier reported the acquisition of 2,567 restricted stock units (RSUs) through a Form 4 filing. These RSUs represent the right to receive one share of Neurocrine Biosciences common stock each and will vest in full on May 27, 2027. This transaction increases her direct holdings to 2,567 RSUs.

feed.title: Neurocrine (NASDAQ: NBIX) CSO exercises options, sells 11,000 pre-planned shares
feed.summary: Neurocrine Biosciences' Chief Scientific Officer, Jude Onyia, exercised stock options for 11,000 shares at $84.74 per share and subsequently sold the same number of shares on the open market at a weighted average price of $155.5332. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on February 25, 2026. Following these transactions, Onyia directly holds 25,846 common shares and 24,268 non-qualified stock options.

feed.title: Nexa Resources SA Gradually Resuming Production At Cajamarquilla
feed.summary: Nexa Resources SA is gradually resuming production at its Cajamarquilla facility. The article is a brief news update from Reuters, indicating the restart of operations after a period of disruption.

feed.title: NMTC - NeuroOne Medical Technologies Corporation stock news, filings & ratings
feed.summary: NeuroOne Medical Technologies Corporation (NMTC) operates as a medical technology company specializing in thin-film electrode technology for various neurological disorders. The company's stock is currently trading at $3.55, down 4.70%, and it has recently seen several SEC filings, including form SD and 8-K. Analyst ratings are mixed with recent updates ranging from Buy to Hold, and the article also details various insider transactions and corporate events like a recent 1-for-6 reverse stock split.

feed.title: NeoVolta Raises $25 Million in Underwritten Stock Offering, Nets $23.5 Million for Growth
feed.summary: NeoVolta successfully completed an underwritten public offering, raising $25 million by issuing 12,195,122 shares of common stock at $2.05 each. The company netted approximately $23.5 million after fees, and plans to utilize these funds to meet joint venture obligations and for general working capital purposes. The agreement also includes a 30-day option for underwriters to purchase an additional 1,829,268 shares.

feed.title: Should nCino’s (NCNO) AI-Driven Q1 Beat and Higher Guidance Require Action From Investors?
feed.summary: nCino (NCNO) reported a strong Q1 fiscal 2027 with increased revenue and net income, alongside higher guidance for Q2 and the full fiscal year. The company attributes this success to the growing adoption of its AI-enabled platform and new pricing model. This positive performance reinforces the investment narrative but also highlights potential risks related to competition and customer price sensitivity in adopting new pricing structures.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN) director sells 10,000 shares of stock
feed.summary: Texas Instruments director Martin S. Craighead sold 10,000 shares of Common Stock in two open-market transactions on May 28, 2026. The sales were executed at weighted average prices of $321.0069 and $320.4075 per share, totaling approximately $3.2 million. Following these transactions, Craighead retains 14,716 shares, and the filing indicated a negative sentiment due to the sale.

feed.title: NVE Corp (NVEC) Stock Down 3.4% but Still Overvalued -- GF Score: 69/100

The GF Value™ indicates an intrinsic value of $66.51, representing a 46.8% overvaluation, and its P/E ratio of 31.1x is well above its 5-year median. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 69/100 and solid financial health, concerns persist regarding its low growth and valuation ranks, coupled with an absence of insider transactions over the last three months.

feed.title: Xylem Inc. (XYL) Announces $1 Billion Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Xylem Inc. has successfully completed a public offering of $1 billion in senior notes, comprising $500 million of 5.200% Senior Notes due 2033 and $500 million of 5.450% Senior Blue Notes due 2036. The proceeds from the 2033 notes will repay existing debt and support general corporate purposes, while the 2036 Blue Notes are designated for sustainable "blue projects." This strategic move aims to efficiently manage debt and advance the company's growth and sustainability goals.

feed.title: Smallcap Software Names Power Fresh Growth Stories
feed.summary: Smallcap software companies are driving growth in the technology sector through solutions in work management, cybersecurity, and supply-chain platforms. Their recurring revenue models offer resilience amidst fluctuating digital demand. The article highlights the importance of these focused software names and their contribution to market leadership trends, particularly within the NASDAQ Composite.

feed.title: James Litinsky Trust lists MP Common stock sales (MP) in multiple April–May 2026 trades

These dispositions include sales of 234,651 shares on May 28, 2026, and 115,349 shares on May 27, 2026, among others. The filing provides specific trade dates, share counts, and listed amounts for each transaction, highlighting transparent insider activity in shares tied to Founder Stock.

feed.title: Northwest Natural VP files Form 4 with no trades | NWN Insider Trading
feed.summary: Zachary D. Kravitz, VP of Regulatory Affairs and Resource Planning at Northwest Natural Holding Co (NWN), has filed a Form 4 indicating no share purchases, sales, or other equity transactions. The filing also reports no derivative exercises and serves primarily to state that Kravitz is no longer considered an officer subject to Section 16 of the Securities Exchange Act, though he remains with a subsidiary. This Form 4 filing therefore signifies an administrative change rather than any insider trading activity.

This transaction leaves Ms. Cerocke with 17,986 shares, while Matson's stock shows strong year-over-year growth and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro, despite a recent Q1 2026 revenue miss.

feed.title: NEXGEL (NASDAQ: NXGL) CEO Adam R. Levy sells 13,000 shares in open market trades

The sales were conducted at prices ranging from $0.5975 to $0.6058 per share. Following these transactions, Levy directly holds 344,692 shares of NEXGEL Common Stock.

feed.title: Seven New Plaintiffs Join Lawsuit Filed By Former Employees Against N3B Los Alamos, HII Nuclear And BWXT Technical Services Group, Under Federal False Claims Act
feed.summary: Seven additional former employees have joined a lawsuit against N3B Los Alamos, HII Nuclear, and BWXT Technical Services Group, alleging wrongful termination under the Federal False Claims Act. The suit, initially filed by two former employees in January 2026, claims they were fired after questioning N3B's compliance with federal acquisition, contracting, employment, and Environment, Safety, and Health standards. The amended complaint, filed in May 2026, now includes claims for False Claims Act retaliation, witness deterrence, negligence per se, and punitive damages.

feed.title: Is Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Its 73% One Year Surge?
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) has seen a significant 72.7% surge over the last year, prompting a valuation check. While a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests it is undervalued by 31.1%, its P/E ratio of 34.7x is above the industry average, indicating it might be overvalued by that metric. Simply Wall St's "Narratives" feature highlights diverging investor opinions, with fair value estimates ranging from a cautious US$44.08 to an optimistic US$81.00 per share, showcasing how different assumptions about growth and risk lead to varied conclusions.

feed.title: Insider Buying: David Nelms Acquires 18,000 Shares of CDW Corp
feed.summary: David Nelms, a Director at CDW Corp, recently purchased 18,000 shares of the company, bringing his total ownership to 51,025.12 shares. This transaction occurred while CDW Corp's stock was trading at $111.43, indicating that the stock is significantly undervalued based on its GF Value of $203.10 and has a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.55. Over the past year, the company has seen two insider buys and one insider sell, with Nelms being the sole buyer of 18,000 shares.

feed.title: Neurocrine Biosciences (NBIX) director receives 2,567 restricted stock units

Each RSU represents one share of common stock upon vesting, and the entire award is scheduled to vest fully on May 27, 2027. This grant aligns the director's compensation with the company's future share performance.

This transaction was pre-planned under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, indicating it was part of routine portfolio management rather than a discretionary trade. After the sale, Mr. Cheng still holds 113,574 shares, representing a substantial stake in LendingClub.

feed.title: LendingClub (LC: LC) CFO sells 20,000 shares in 10b5-1 stock sale
feed.summary: LendingClub CFO Andrew LaBenne sold 20,000 shares of common stock on May 28, 2026, at a weighted-average price of $17.0032 per share. This transaction was part of a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan designed to diversify his assets, and he now directly holds 234,955 shares. The plan allows sales of up to 7.0% of his equity interest in LendingClub, and he also indirectly holds 12,000 shares for his children.

feed.title: Wynn Resorts (WYNN) director exercises 10,827 stock options at $81.55

He also holds 34,195 indirect common shares through a Family Trust. The transaction, filed as a Form 4, indicates a neutral filing sentiment and has a high impact.

feed.title: LKFN (LKFN) proposed sale notice: 5,900 shares via Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing indicates a proposed sale of 5,900 shares of Lakeland Financial Corporation (LKFN) acquired on 07/19/2018. The filing, dated 05/29/2026, lists Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC as the broker-dealer and an amount of $357,653.87. This form serves as a notice of intent to sell restricted or controlled securities, not a confirmation of an executed sale.

feed.title: Kustom Entertainment enters EDM with Global Frequencies
feed.summary: Kustom Entertainment, known for its large-scale live events, is making a significant entry into the U.S. dance music scene with "Global Frequencies." This one-day EDM event on June 28, 2026, at Azura Amphitheater in Bonner Springs, Kansas, features a robust lineup including DJ Diesel, Loud Luxury, TroyBoi, Alison Wonderland, and KSHMR. The company aims to prove that demand for EDM extends beyond coastal regions and plans for "Global Frequencies" to be the first of many electronic music events nationwide.

feed.title: FiEE (NASDAQ: FIEE) registers 494,476 shares for resale by holders
feed.summary: FiEE, Inc. (NASDAQ: FIEE) has filed an S-3 resale registration for 494,476 shares of common stock to be sold by selling stockholders. The company will not receive any proceeds from these sales, and the shares may be sold through various methods. As of May 28, 2026, FiEE had 8,528,598 shares outstanding, with a last reported closing price of $5.20 per share on Nasdaq.

feed.title: Vistra (NYSE: VST) SVP and CAO sells 5,000 shares in open market
feed.summary: Vistra Corp.'s Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer, Margaret Montemayor, sold 5,000 shares of company common stock at $164.96 per share on May 27, 2026. Following this open-market transaction, she directly holds 14,360 Vistra common shares. The sale, valued at approximately $824,800, is considered a routine insider sale by analysts.

feed.title: Regeneron Fell 15% Over the Past 30 Days. Here’s What to Expect in 2026
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) stock dropped 15% in the last 30 days due to investor concerns about future growth drivers and a pipeline setback in a Phase 3 melanoma study. Despite a recent earnings beat and strong Dupixent sales, the company's fianlimab and Libtayo combination failed to achieve statistical significance in its trial, leading to analyst downgrades. However, TIKR's valuation model suggests a target price of around $880, implying a 41% upside, provided Dupixent continues its strong performance, EYLEA HD executes well, and the pipeline sees new successes.

feed.title: Ormat Technologies (NYSE:ORA) Director Sells $34,605.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Ormat Technologies (NYSE:ORA) Director Stanley Stern sold 250 shares of the company's stock for $34,605 on May 27th, adding to a previous sale of 577 shares earlier in May. Despite insider selling, the company reported strong first-quarter earnings, beating analyst estimates with $1.30 EPS on $403.91 million in revenue. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $133.18, and institutional investors collectively own 95.49% of the stock.

feed.title: FDA approves Afrezza for children and adolescents with diabetes
feed.summary: The FDA has approved MannKind Corp.'s Afrezza, an inhaled insulin, for children and adolescents aged 6 and older with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes. This marks the first needle-free insulin option for pediatric diabetes patients, offering a rapid-acting solution that can be dosed at the start of a meal to better accommodate variable routines. The approval was based on the INHALE-1 study, which demonstrated Afrezza's non-inferiority to daily insulin injections in glycemic control and showed reassuring pulmonary safety.

feed.title: IBUY ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns AMEX:IBUY
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth analysis of the Amplify Online Retail ETF (IBUY), detailing its key statistics such as assets under management, dividend yield, and expense ratio. It outlines the ETF's investment strategy, classification, and performance metrics, including recent price and NAV total returns. Additionally, the analysis breaks down IBUY's fund composition by exposure type, sector, and region, and answers frequently asked questions about its holdings, dividends, and issuing company.

feed.title: Employees rate First Horizon a Great Place to Work for 7th time
feed.summary: First Horizon (NYSE:FHN) has been recognized as a Great Place to Work-Certified™ company for the seventh consecutive time, an accolade based on an independent employee survey. The certification highlights the company's commitment to fostering a collaborative and supportive workplace environment where employees feel valued and empowered. Tanya Hart, Chief Human Resources Officer, credited the associates for their role in making this achievement possible.

feed.title: Corre discloses 8.2% NN Inc (NNBR) ownership and warrant position
feed.summary: Corre Partners and its affiliates have reported an 8.2% beneficial ownership in NN Inc. (NNBR), amounting to 4,386,665 shares, through an amended Schedule 13D filing. The investment was initially made for investment purposes, but Corre is reviewing its position and retains flexibility for potential strategic actions, including discussions with NN Inc.'s management and board regarding mergers, asset sales, or governance changes. Additionally, Corre-related funds hold common stock purchase warrants with an exercise price of $11.03 per share, subject to a 9.99% ownership cap.

feed.title: [Form 4] Northwest Natural Holding Co Insider Trading Activity

Williams, former VP, Chief PA & Sustainability, is no longer subject to Section 16 of the Exchange Act as she is no longer an officer of the issuer. This means she will no longer report transactions on Form 4 or 5, though she remains a non-executive officer of a subsidiary.

feed.title: (MOTG) Price Dynamics and Execution-Aware Positioning
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed analysis of Vaneck Morningstar Global Wide Moat Etf (NASDAQ: MOTG), outlining a neutral sentiment across all time horizons with a mid-channel oscillation pattern. It presents three distinct AI-generated trading strategies—Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—along with specific entry zones, targets, and stop losses. The analysis highlights a significant risk-reward short setup targeting a 4.3% downside versus 0.3% risk.

feed.title: Mid-Sized Utility Names Powering Steady Growth Narratives
feed.summary: Mid-sized utility operators are gaining attention due to their regulated electric, gas, and water services, focused regional operations, and essential infrastructure programs. These companies maintain steady demand in essential service markets, contributing to their growth narratives. The article emphasizes their substantial scale and focused regional exposure, noting that water utilities offer regulated returns with continuous investment needs.

feed.title: This Tesla owner won a $10k refund in court for Tesla’s FSD lies (Updated)
feed.summary: A Tesla owner successfully sued Tesla in small claims court for a $10,600 refund for its Full Self-Driving (FSD) software, which failed to deliver on its promises. Despite initial delays and Tesla's attempts to push back deadlines, the court ultimately ruled in the owner's favor, citing Tesla's lack of a meritorious defense and CEO Elon Musk's admission that older hardware cars would never achieve full self-driving. This case highlights a growing trend of owners seeking refunds for undelivered FSD capabilities, with similar class-action lawsuits emerging globally.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Monarch Casino & Resort (NASDAQ:MCRI) CEO Sells $604,200.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Monarch Casino & Resort (NASDAQ:MCRI) CEO John Farahi sold 5,000 shares of company stock for $604,200.00. This sale reduces his ownership by 0.80%, though he still holds 616,556 shares valued at approximately $74.5 million. The company recently exceeded earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $1.52 against a $1.15 consensus and an 8.9% increase in revenue year-over-year.
